html:
The Slurper Pelt is an item with a 50% chance to be dropped by Slurpers. It can be used to craft a Belt of Hunger. Like meat items, a Slurper Pelt can be used to befriend a Pig, or it can be exchanged with the Pig King for a Gold Nugget. However, Bunnymen don't count it as meat, and won't mind if a player has one/picks one up.

The Slurper Pelt is an item with a 50% chance to be dropped by Slurpers. It can be used to craft a Belt of Hunger. Like meat items, a Slurper Pelt can be used to befriend a Pig, or it can be exchanged with the Pig King for a Gold Nugget. However, Bunnymen don't count it as meat, and won't mind if a player has one/picks one up.

The '''Slurper Pelt''' is an [[item]] with a 50% chance to be dropped by [[Slurper]]s. It can be used to craft a [[Belt of Hunger]]. Like meat items, a Slurper Pelt can be used to befriend a [[Pig]], or it can be exchanged with the [[Pig King]] for a [[Gold Nugget]]. However, [[Bunnymen]] don't count it as meat, and won't mind if a player has one/picks one up.
